subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-05-21
subcodes.first_line: Yes. We must wait and see how the results of the mighty events which are taking place in these days will shape themselves into concrete facts
subcodes.subjects: @unity of governments; political unity, @present and future expansion of arts and sciences; of technology, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @unity; oneness of humanity
